title: Delightful Quick Fix Peruvian Avocado Picarones
description: Quick fix Peruvian dish featuring avocado, a rich and juicy treat with ovo-vegetarian-friendly options.

ingredients.name: ripe avocados, diced
ingredients.notes: use ripe avocados for the best flavor

ingredients.name: pressure cooker
ingredients.notes: a medium-sized pressure cooker is ideal

ingredients.name: Korean brass bowl
ingredients.notes: a large, deep bowl is necessary for forming the picarones

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: large egg
ingredients.notes: use a large egg for the best texture

ingredients.name: unsweetened almond milk
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality unsweetened almond milk

ingredients.name: coconut oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality coconut oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: maple syrup
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality maple syrup for the best flavor

ingredients.name: chopped fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: use fresh cilantro for the best flavor

instructions: Rinse the diced avocado in cold water to remove any excess starch.
Drain the diced avocado and set it aside.
Add the flour, baking powder, salt, and egg to a large mixing bowl.
Mix the dry ingredients together until well combined.
Add the unsweetened almond milk and mix until the batter is smooth.
Heat the coconut oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fried picarones from the pressure cooker and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the picarones hot in a Korean brass bowl, topped with diced avocado and chopped fresh cilantro.
Drizzle with maple syrup and serve immediately.
